title: Control plane startup reconciliation → crashed state reset
evidence: All 7 TC-016 tests passed in 1459ms (361/361 total tests across 52 files): - ✓ reconcile() runs without error - ✓ PROVISIONING tenant → status=FAILED after reconciliation - ✓ STARTING tenant → status=FAILED after reconciliation - ✓ expired startup_lock → deleted after reconciliation - ✓ stale PROCESSING message → status=PENDING after reconciliation - ✓ SYSTEM_STARTUP audit log entry written (actor='system', tenant_id=null) - ✓ ACTIVE tenant status unchanged (only PROVISIONING/STARTING are reset)
